name: 远程办公 / 混合办公 / RTO
description: 在家办公(WFH)、混合办公、返岗令(return-to-office mandate)对员工态度、行为与福祉的影响。

topic: work from home, remote work, telework, hybrid work arrangements
return-to-office mandates and policies, RTO backlash
flexibility, work location choice, distributed work
method: natural experiment around policy shocks (COVID, RTO announcements)
setting: knowledge work, tech industry, office-based occupations
